_comment: Percentage of each category that the EX (Lindsey) reimburses Ned. Edit these anytime.
_date_cutoff_note: Set to 'YYYY-MM-DD' (e.g. 2025-01-10 judgment date) to exclude older items, or null to include all.
_treat_all_note: When true, tuition INVOICES are counted as paid (deduped); partial-payment receipts of an already-counted invoice are not double-counted.
